scope: Release APK server-wide project list and open-project smoke on a real Android Emulator using ADB UIAutomator instead of Flutter Driver.

mobile_app.head: 44540aa
mobile_app.commit: test: add release project list avd smoke

source.head: 7e436f7e
source.commit: fix: order mobile native transcript pages by record time

release_apk.build_warning: file_picker and mobile_scanner still use plugin-applied Kotlin Gradle Plugin; Flutter reports this as a future deprecation warning.

ui_smoke.automation: ADB UIAutomator XML plus adb input tap; no Flutter Driver.

acceptance_notes: The run started two disposable real /home/bfly/yunwei/test_ccb2 projects and a loopback-only server-wide gateway.
The release APK was seeded with the paired profile using CCB_MOBILE_TEST_PROFILE_SEED=true and opened without Flutter Driver.
The project list showed both fresh test_ccb2 projects from the real gateway and the harness opened test_ccb2_alpha.
The opened project page showed mobile_probe/mobile_peer agent chips and the selected-agent composer controls.
The harness had to read Flutter release semantics from content-desc instead of text; a self-test now covers that parser behavior.
residual_risks: This closes release APK launch, server-wide project listing, and open-project smoke only.
Release-mode long-history frame/memory pressure, release file download performance, and release idle/power soak remain separate gates.
